title: How Luxury Brands Are Quietly Leaning Into Artificial Intelligence
description: Luxury brand expert, Silvia Coleman, explains how luxury brands are quietly leaning into using artificial intelligence while doubling down on building consumer trust.
content: Artificial intelligence is rapidly transforming nearly every industry. The luxury space may appear resistant to that change at first glance but he sector has long been defined by heritage, craftsmanship and exclusivity rather than technological disru... [7647 chars]

title: Here's what’s at stake at this year’s UN Indigenous forum
description: Hundreds of delegates are arriving at the United Nations this week for the world’s largest gathering of Indigenous peoples. But they arrive against an increasingly hostile global backdrop, facing an artificial intelligence boom driving new extraction on ancestral lands, a U.S. administration that has made it increasingly difficult for Global South delegates to secure visas to attend, and the twin challenges of climate change and green energy projects that have frequently run afoul of Indigenous land rights.
content: Hundreds of delegates are arriving at the United Nations this week for the world’s largest gathering of Indigenous peoples. But they arrive against an increasingly hostile global backdrop, facing an artificial intelligence boom driving new extraction... [11538 chars]

title: Mississippi law school is among first in nation to require AI education
